lastReleaseMessage: Security + dependency remediation (bar-raise 2026-07-01). Rotated the exposed Discord announcements webhook (old deleted, leaked 5b3d7cc URL now 404, replacement wired + tested). Cleared all high+ dependency advisories: vitest 1.6->3.2.6 (CRITICAL Vitest-UI file-read), vite 5->6.4.3 via override (HIGH server.fs.deny bypass), form-data>=4.0.6 override (HIGH CRLF injection), hono->4.12.27. pnpm audit clean at high+; preship green on vite 6 + vitest 3 (153 API + 20 web tests). Added the Plaid-relay privacy disclosure on the YaE budget privacy page. All twelve 2026-07-01 bar-raise actions now closed; verdict healthy.

barRaise.topFinding: All twelve 2026-07-01 bar-raise actions are closed. v0.14.2 fixed the HIGH meta NOT NULL updated_at runtime bug (consent + app-lock 500s) with a regression test, plus a global onError logEvent boundary, Plaid sync-failure logging, a Plaid takeover/restore snapshot gate, yab.cmd encrypted-launch detection, and an insights money-math test. v0.14.3 closed the rest: the exposed Discord announcements webhook was rotated (old webhook deleted, leaked URL now 404 dead, replacement wired and tested), and the dependency advisories were cleared (vitest 1 to 3.2.6 fixes the CRITICAL, vite 5 to 6.4.3 and a form-data 4.0.6 override fix the HIGH, hono to 4.12.27) with pnpm audit now clean at high+. Data-integrity FK deletes and web smoke tests were closed by design decision; the queued Task-Scheduler drift-fix and the YaE privacy-page Plaid-relay disclosure both landed. Working tree clean; 153 API and 20 web tests green on the upgraded toolchain; all seven hard rules hold.
